text_block_list.text:
King Halo and I are making our way back to the
academy.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Hey, um...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Well, I had a wonderful and productive time
today, completely befitting a first-rate
Umamusume such as myself...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
But doesn't it feel a little early to go back to the
academy? It's still so bright outside.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Since we're already out and about, why don't we
stroll around a little more?
choice_data_list: Sure. Where would you like to go?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Where? I mean, anywhere is fine...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Actually, you decide our destination!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
A trainer worthy of me must have an exhaustive
list of first-rate spots!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Now, entertain your king!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
A fast food restaurant... Well, it's not like I hate
them...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
But is this what you consider a first-rate spot fit
for me?
choice_data_list:
I thought you might be tired from walking
around.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Hmm, all right. I suppose I'll have some iced tea.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
In the meantime, you should think about our next
destination.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
We still have plenty of time. Think of more
first-rate places fit for me.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Karaoke seems like an easy way to kill time, but...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Do you think karaoke is first-rate?
choice_data_list:
It's first-rate to practice for your winning
concert!

It's first-rate to practice for your winning
concert!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Oh, of course! Ohohoho!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Which means you're confident that I'll win the
race!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Okay, let's practice! Just imagine me standing
right in the center of the stage!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
And while you're at it, think about where we're
going after this!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Your next first-rate place is... your office?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Is our excursion all finished, then? Are you
throwing in the towel?
choice_data_list:
I thought we might discuss our strategy for your
next race.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Ah, I should have guessed!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, not bad! Let's come up with a plan to get
me over the finish line first!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Phew... Oh, when did it get so dark outside? We
must have been really focused.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Which means you managed to take me around
places fit for me...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, all your spots were first-rate! You pass,
Trainer!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Honestly speaking, every one of those places was
completely ordinary.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
But you chose each location with me in mind,
which is truly commendable!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Well done, Trainer! I suppose I can allow you to
take pride in your achievement... just for today!
Ohohoho!
choice_data_list: Leave the destinations to me from now on!
Leave the destinations to me from now on!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Well done, Trainer! I suppose I can allow you to
take pride in your achievement... just for today!
Ohohoho!
choice_data_list: Leave the destinations to me from now on!
Leave the destinations to me from now on!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
That's what I like to hear! Keep at it, and I think
we can challenge ourselves to even greater
heights.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
From now on, all of my breaks will be completely
up to you. Continue taking me to first-rate spots!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
In return, I will take you with me on the path of
glory! Ohohoho!

It feels like King Halo and I have grown to trust
each other even more.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Excuse me?! I'm always amenable!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I swear... It seems your ability to take a
compliment is still second-rate at best.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
So be it. I'll just have to work even harder to
make you a first-rate trainer.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
So make sure to watch my every move and learn
what it truly means to be first-rate! Ohohoho!

And so, my journey to becoming a trainer worthy
of King Halo continues.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I did say "just for today." Don't let it go to
your head.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: One must always strive to build on previous efforts! Even I can't afford to become complacent.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Let's rise together to become the first-rate of the
first-rate! Ohohoho!

King Halo and I laugh together as we aim for
greater heights.
